title: Telegram Intel Feed Update
summary: U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham called on Arab states to join the war against Iran in a direct attempt to drag them into a conflict that serves American and Israeli interests. He said the United States “will not go to the Middle East to fight alone,” suggesting that any Arab country seeking security agreements with Washington must take part in the war. | 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 ⚡️ - Lebanon has officially announced over half a million Lebanese citizens were displaced as of this morning. On the 517.000 displaced citizens, 117.000 are currently hosted in emergency or permanent shelters, with the rest still being on the move, staying at a relative's place or planning to leave the country. | The aftermath of U.S.-Israeli strikes on residential homes in Borujerd, western Iran. | 🇷🇺 🤝 🇮🇷 Russia's Lavrov meets with Arab ambassadors in Moscow who request that he pressure Iran to de-escalate. Lavrov rejects their requests and points out that they have not condemned the bombing of the girls' school in Iran, and that Bahrain reportedly is seeking to introduce a resolution at the UNSC that condemns Iran's retaliation, but not Israel and the US for initiating the war. Whether that is accurate or not, Lavrov's response seems to suggest that 9 days into the war, Moscow's position is moving closer to that of Tehran. 🔗 Trita Parsi (@tparsi) | ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israel Channel 12: Four senior IRGC Quds Force officials were reportedly killed in last night’s strike on a hotel in Beirut’s Rouché:  • Majid Hassini – Head of the Finance Branch in the Lebanon Corps • Ali Bi Azar – Head of Intelligence in the Lebanon… | IDF: Chief of the General Staff during a situational assessment at the Home Front Command: “Hezbollah is an extremist arm of the Iranian octopus - it is paying and will continue to pay a heavy price; this war will determine our future and security for many years” The Chief of the General Staff, LTG Eyal Zamir, held a situational assessment today (Sunday) with the Commander of the Home Front Command, MG Shay Klapper, the Commander of the Aerial Defense Array, BG K., and additional commanders. From the remarks of the Chief of the General Staff, LTG Eyal Zamir: “Overnight, we operated against Iranian Quds Force commanders in Lebanon - in Beirut - and targeted them. I tell you that there is no safe place for the Iranian axis of evil anywhere in the Middle East - not in Beirut and not anywhere else. At the same time, we experienced significant fire toward the communities of northern Israel, and there was also an incident during the night. From here, I wish to send my condolences to the families of the fallen and wish a speedy recovery to our injured. Hezbollah is an extremist arm of the Iranian octopus - it is paying and will continue to pay a heavy price.” “Israel has been in a prolonged state of emergency for the past two years. What we need right now, above all, is persistence and patience. This will take considerable time, you must be prepared for that, and however long it takes, it will take. And I say to you: you know this very well: the side that will prevail is the one that demonstrates determination and persistence. We know our home front; it has tremendous resilience. I am confident in the strength of our home front to provide us with all the support needed to maintain our achievements.” “I know that civilians at home are required to enter protected spaces frequently. We continuously review the directives in accordance with the situational picture. I say to the civilians - remain attentive and act according to the instructions. All of us are part of this effort together: the pilots of the Israeli Air Force, the troops of the Armored Corps, the Infantry Corps, and the Combat Engineering Corps who are currently positioned along the border lines and now in Lebanon, all of us are together in this effort. It is a very significant effort. I will go further than that  -  I spoke about the persistence and determination required from all of us - this is the war of our generation. It is a critical war, a decisive war. This war will determine our future and our security here for many years to come.” Attached is a related video: https://bit.ly/4daQS7T Attached are related photos: https://IDFANC.activetrail.biz/ANC9236757865 | ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇵🇸 Israeli Channel 12: Qatar told the Americans that they are going to expel the Hamas leadership from their territory after they refused to condemn the Iranian attacks. @wfwitness | Cicrculating footage show flames erupting from storm drains across Tehran after U.S-Israeli strikes targeted oil infrastructure in the northern part of the Iranian capital, yesterday evening. The fires are believed to be linked to burning fuel runoff from the Shahran Oil Depot, sending flames and smoke through parts of the city’s underground drainage system. | ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 IDF announces that the Israeli Air Force targeted and eliminated Abolghasem Babaeian yesterday, Saturday, in Tehran. Babaeian had been appointed as the head of the office for the new Supreme Leader, who has not yet been selected. This appointment came after Mohammad Shirazi, the head of the military office of the previous leader Khamenei, was eliminated in the opening strike of Operation "Roar of the Lions." @wfwitness | IDF: The IDF eliminated five senior commanders in the IRGC Quds Force’s Lebanon Corps in a precise strike in Beirut Overnight, the Israeli Navy, directed by precise IDF intelligence, conducted a precise strike in Beirut, Lebanon, targeting five commanders from the IRGC’s Lebanon Corps and Palestine Corps while they were meeting at a hotel in Beirut. The Quds Force’s Lebanon Corps serves as a central liaison between the Hezbollah terrorist organization and the Iranian terrorist regime. Its senior officials synchronize activities across the various terrorist organizations operating in Lebanon. The commanders eliminated in the strike were advancing terrorist activity across Lebanon while hiding in a civilian hotel. It can now be revealed that three key Quds Force commanders were eliminated in the strike: * Majid Hassini – Responsible for transferring funds to the regime’s proxies in Lebanon to finance the activities of the Hezbollah terrorist organization, the Lebanon Corps, the Palestine Corps, the Hamas terrorist organization, and additional terrorist organizations operating from Lebanon. He was also responsible for funding and producing weapons to advance Hezbollah’s military activity. * Ali Reza Bi-Azar – Served as the Head of the Intelligence Branch of the Quds Force’s Lebanon Corps. Bi-Azar was considered a significant source of expertise in the field of intelligence research and, in his role, gathered intelligence for the Hezbollah terrorist organization. * Ahmad Rasouli – Served as the Intelligence Officer of the Quds Force’s Palestine Corps. As part of his role, he was responsible for collecting intelligence for Palestinian terrorist organizations in Lebanon and the Gaza Strip. In addition, Hossein Ahmadlou, an intelligence operative who worked to gather intelligence on the State of Israel for terrorist purposes, and Abu Mohammad Ali, Hezbollah’s representative in the Palestine Corps who was responsible for maintaining the organization’s ongoing coordination with the Palestine Corps, were also eliminated. These commanders were eliminated following the elimination of the commander of the Lebanon Corps last week, Daoud Ali Zadeh. Their elimination constitutes a significant and necessary blow to the Iranian presence in Lebanon and to the Hezbollah terrorist organization. The IDF will not allow the Iranian terror regime elements to establish themselves in Lebanon and will continue to precisely eliminate the commanders of the Iranian terror regime wherever they operate. Attached is an infographic of the elimination of the Lebanon Corps commanders eliminated during Operation Roaring Lion: https://IDFANC.activetrail.biz/ANCIDF080326332432 | 📉 Wall Street just posted a number WORSE than the 2008 Financial Crisis. And almost nobody is talking about it. Finance and insurance job openings collapsed by 117,000 in a single month. The largest monthly decline during the entire 2008 crash was 125,000. We're nearly there in one month, without a crisis. Total finance job openings are now 134,000, the lowest since 2012. Down 75% from the 2022 peak and 410,000 openings have vanished. Fewer than 2 out of every 100 finance jobs in America are vacant right now. That's the lowest rate this century, lower than the dot-com bust and than post-9/11. Only the 2009 collapse was worse by barely. Meanwhile, Morgan Stanley just cut 2,500 workers after a record revenue year. Citigroup is eliminating 20,000 jobs by year end. BlackRock cut hundreds in January. Jack Dorsey fired 4,000 people at Block and said the quiet part out loud, AI did it. His stock jumped 25% and Wall Street didn't mourn the layoffs but instead it rewarded them. Goldman Sachs is now warning that AI-driven job losses could push unemployment to 4.5% or higher this year. The finance industry isn't downsizing because it's losing money. It's downsizing because machines are replacing the people who make the money. 🔗 Stock Market News | ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🏳️ Sources speaking to the Turkish Ministry of Defense stated that Turkey is considering deploying F-16’s in the TRNC to protect the northern part of the island from Iranian attacks.  @wfwitness | U.S. Senator Bernie Sanders on U.S.-Israeli war against Iran: "Netanyahu is a right-wing extremist who committed horrible crimes, what I think are genocidal crimes against the people of Gaza." Sanders added that Donald Trump is now effectively “doing Netanyahu’s work in Iran.” | 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 The War Is Now Moving Every Commodity Market 🛢 Oil: +21% ✈️ Jet fuel: +87% 🔥 LNG: +106% 🚢 VLCC tanker rates: +201% 🚢 LNG carrier rates: +529% 🏗 Aluminum: +20% 🌾 Fertilizer: +36% 🧪 Naphtha: +26% 🔗 Jack Prandelli | ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Axios: U.S. Special Envoy Witkoff and Jared Kushner are scheduled to visit Israel on Tuesday. @wfwitness | ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 The UK said British forces shot down a one way attack drone launched from Iran toward Iraq as RAF Typhoon and F-35 jets continued defensive sorties in the region. A Merlin helicopter is also being deployed to strengthen early detection of incoming drones or missiles. @wfwitness | ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Ayatollah Hosseini Bushehri announced that Iran’s Assembly of Experts will soon announce the final report on the process of selecting and introducing the third leader of the Islamic Republic. Bushehri offered condolences for the death of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and said the Assembly of Experts immediately convened its leadership after news of his death despite what he described as wartime conditions and external threats. He said members of the assembly have been summoned from across the country to carry out the constitutional process of appointing a new leader, emphasising that the selection is being treated as a priority. @wfwitness | 🇾🇪 🇸🇦 - Marib Online, Saudi-funded Yemeni outlet confirms the Houthis launched drones at Saudi Arabia's oil infrastructure.  No comment from Ansarullah or Riyadh as of yet. | Israeli occupation forces detain several Palestinians at a checkpoint in the town of Silwan, in the occupied Jerusalem, according to local sources. | ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CENTCOM issued a warning to civilians that Iran is launching military operations from densely populated areas. They accused Iranian forces are launching one-way attack drones and ballistic missiles from locations in cities including Dezful, Isfahan and Shiraz, arguing that such actions endanger civilians and could cause those sites to lose protected status under international law. CENTCOM urged civilians in Iran to remain at home and warned that facilities used for military purposes could become legitimate targets during ongoing operations. @wfwitness | Large crowds gather in Tehran’s Islamic Republic Square to denounce the ongoing U.S.-Israeli attacks against their country. | ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇨🇾 🇮🇱 🇺🇳 Al Jadeed: political sources say the Lebanese presidency is working on a new initiative aimed at reaching a solution to the current war, with both political and field components. The field component reportedly focuses on the Lebanese Army deploying across all Lebanese territory and adhering to the government's decision, amid discussions following the recent statement by the army commander that sparked debate. Sources also say a civilian delegation may be formed to hold direct negotiations with Israel outside Lebanon, with Cyprus likely being the location. Meanwhile, the UN Special Coordinator for Lebanon, Jeanine Hennis-Plasschaert, is expected to travel to Israel for talks before returning to Lebanon to meet President Aoun. @wfwitness | 🇮🇷 ❌ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 — Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi on Senator Lindsey Graham: In Iran, an official could never travel to another country to collude with a foreign spy service on how to "coach" our own President into doing bidding of foreigners. We would ask what the foreign country may have on that official. And promptly charge him/her with High Treason. | Intensifying Israeli settler violence has forced a Palestinian family to flee Khirbet Yarza, east of Tubas in the occupied West Bank. | 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 ⚡ - BREAKING: Saudi Arabia announces a projectile struck al-Kharj's sanitation facility, south of Riyadh. One killed, 12+ others injured.
